mapper.sql: id, openid, order_no, amount, operator, detail_type, create_time, accid
a.id, a.openid, a.order_no as orderNo, a.amount, a.operator, a.detail_type as detailType, a.create_time as createTime, a.accid, b.phone, c.name
mapper.select:
select
from biz_yck_czmx a left join biz_wx_user b on a.openid = b.openid left join sys_user c on b.phone = c.phone
and (a.openid = #{condition} or b.phone = #{condition} or c.name = #{condition})
and a.detail_type = #{detailType}
and (a.create_time between CONCAT(#{createStartTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{createEndTime},' 23:59:59'))
ORDER BY a.create_time desc

select a.*,a.detail_type as detailType ,ba.* from biz_yck_czmx a left join sys_user c on a.account = c.account left join biz_accident ba on ba.id=a.accid where a.account=#{account} ORDER BY a.create_time desc
